implementation_blocked_reason: M5 complete: all implementation tasks, architecture/security review gates, and T16 final validation passed.

amendments.summary: Terminology clarification (Agentic Layer vs AKS Agent Gateway); E2E tracing requirements (mock + AKS, OTEL/Jaeger, FR-11, FR-12, NFR-07); tasks T17–T20 added (tracing design, OTEL instrumentation, Compose overlay, tracing security review); roadmap milestone outcomes updated.

ADR-M5-01.question: AKS optional track vs ACA default track

ADR-M5-02.question: Agent ID sidecar mock boundary vs real SDK / direct MSAL
ADR-M5-02.decision: Option A — in-process AgentSidecarClient ABC with MockAgentSidecarClient

ADR-M5-03.question: JWKS client library and key-rotation / caching strategy
ADR-M5-03.decision: Option A — PyJWT + manual httpx JWKS fetch, in-process TTL dict (300s, configurable), kid-keyed cache, one kid-miss retry, algorithm normalization to lowercase

notes: Promoted from draft/research-only to tasks-ready on 2026-05-14 by spec-feature agent.
All spec artifacts are complete. Implementation is blocked pending T03 (security review).
No implementation files (runtime/infra code) were modified during spec promotion.
Existing identity-notes.md and infra-notes.md are preserved; their research content is integrated into research.md and design.md.
Spec-first gate is now satisfied. Coordinator should schedule T01 (Morpheus review) to unblock the review stream.

T20 COMPLETE 2026-05-30 — Trinity. Tracing security review: all 8 security checks passed — no PII span attributes, no raw bearer tokens in spans, OTEL SDK auto-disabled in offline test runs (no OTLP endpoint set), Jaeger/collector config routes only to internal Docker network (no external egress), no port conflicts with base Compose ports, fixture_name suppressed in strict mode (all 3 services), no live Azure/App Insights secrets committed, overlay is opt-in. Validation: python -m pytest → 200 passed; docker compose config --quiet → exit 0. T15 dependency on T20 satisfied; T15 remains blocked on T13+T14.

T19 COMPLETE 2026-05-28 — Tank. Created docker/docker-compose.tracing.yml (otel-collector otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.104.0 + jaeger jaegertracing/all-in-one:1.58; images pinned; ILLUSTRATIVE comment present; OTEL env vars added to bff/agent-gateway/mcp-protected-api; network merge via compose -f). Created docker/otel-collector-config.yaml (OTLP gRPC+HTTP → otlp/jaeger exporter to jaeger:4317). docker/README.md updated with opt-in tracing usage section. Validation: docker compose config --quiet exit 0. T20 now blocked only on T18.
Amendment 001 applied 2026-05-15: terminology clarification, E2E tracing requirements (FR-11, FR-12, NFR-07), tasks T17–T20.
Amendment 001 approved by Ashley Hollis after Morpheus architecture review and Spec Feature terminology reconciliation. Implementation remains blocked pending T03.

Amendment 001 terminology correction applied 2026-05-15: 'local app gateway' superseded by 'Agentic Layer' and 'standalone Agent Gateway' superseded by 'AKS Agent Gateway' per ADR 0006 (accepted by Morpheus). Artifact paths apps/agent-gateway/ and Docker Compose service name agent-gateway preserved as legacy references.

T18 COMPLETE 2026-05-29 — Neo. OTEL instrumentation for mock flow: shared telemetry.py in identity_lab_auth (setup_telemetry/get_tracer/instrument_fastapi/record_auth_attributes/record_obo_attributes/safe_span_attribute_key); all three services instrumented (BFF, Agentic Layer, MCP Protected API); identity_lab.* span attributes; strict-mode fixture_name suppression; PII guard; OTEL_SDK_DISABLED env var in all env.example files; 34 new tests. 174 total tests pass. T20 (Trinity tracing review) now ready.

T11 COMPLETE 2026-05-29 — Neo. Implemented MockAgentSidecarClient in agent_obo.py: validate() checks aud/tid/exp/scp vs blueprint_audience+trusted_tenants, returns sanitize_claims(fixture_claims); authorization_header() returns 'Bearer OFFLINE_MOCK_TOKEN' (zero HTTP); downstream_api() validates fixture aud as proxy then returns sanitize_claims(obo_fixture_claims). Exported from __init__.py. New test file tests/security/test_mock_agent_sidecar_client.py: 21 tests (happy-path, wrong-aud, untrusted-tenant, stale, app-only, downstream-wrong-aud, missing-actor, no-PII, path-separation, package-export, fixture-immutability). python -m pytest -> 200 passed. T12 now unblocked.

T04 COMPLETE 2026-05-10 — Tank created AKS Terraform module skeletons: modules/aks, modules/workload-identity, modules/k8s-bootstrap, environments/aks. All placeholder-only (no real IDs/secrets). terraform fmt -check -recursive, init -backend=false, and validate all pass. T05 now unblocked.

T05 COMPLETE 2026-05-27 — Tank created docs/deployment/k8s/ with README.md, namespace.yaml, service-account.yaml, agent-gateway-deployment.yaml, network-policy.yaml. All files labelled ILLUSTRATIVE REFERENCE ONLY. Agentic Layer terminology used throughout; all GUIDs are all-zero placeholders; no real IDs/secrets. YAML syntax validated. T14 dependency on T05 satisfied; T14 remains blocked on T12+T13+T18+T19.

T06 COMPLETE 2026-05-15 — Trinity. Added xms_act_fct to config/claims/safe-claims-allowlist.json and DEFAULT_SAFE_CLAIM_KEYS in claims.py. Extended _sanitize_value() to handle dict inputs safely (recursive scalar sanitization, 512-char JSON bound, nested-dict safe). New test file tests/security/test_t06_actor_claims.py covers: xms_act_fct inclusion, oid/sub suppression, dict handling without raise, sanitize_claims integration. T07 now unblocked.

T07 COMPLETE 2026-05-28 — Trinity. Created seven Agent ID / Agent OBO fixture JSON files under tests/fixtures/sample-claims/: agent-blueprint-user-token, agent-obo-mcp-token, agent-wrong-audience, agent-missing-actor, agent-app-only-blueprint, agent-untrusted-tenant, agent-replay-stale. All all-zero placeholder GUIDs. No PII claims (no oid/sub/email/upn/name). xms_act_fct in obo-mcp-token is JSON object {appid: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000201}. exp=1893456000 for valid fixtures; exp=1600000000 for stale fixture. Validation: python -m pytest tests/security/test_t06_actor_claims.py tests/security/test_jwks_strict.py -> 49 passed. T08 and T11 now unblocked.

T08 COMPLETE 2026-05-29 — Trinity. Added require_actor_appid() guard to guards.py (checks appid non-empty string at MCP boundary). New test file tests/security/test_t08_negative_fixture_tests.py: 5 offline negative tests — wrong_audience (require_audience returns False), missing_actor (require_actor_appid returns False; fixture is delegated-shaped but lacks appid), app_only_blueprint (require_delegated_token returns False; no scp), untrusted_tenant (validate_claims includes 'untrusted_tenant'), replay_stale (validate_claims includes 'token_expired' with clock_skew=0). Zero network calls. All assertions target rejection reason, not just boolean. python -m pytest -> 200 passed. T13 (Neo) still blocked on T12 only.

T09 COMPLETE 2026-05-15 — Trinity. Created apps/shared/python/identity_lab_auth/jwks.py implementing: ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS, REJECTED_ALGORITHMS, _validate_algorithm() with lowercase normalization (closes mixed-case bypass), JwksCache dataclass with TTL/kid-miss-retry/injectable http client, validate_strict() with jku/x5u suppression. New test file tests/security/test_jwks_strict.py covers: alg:none (all mixed-case variants), HS256/HS384/HS512, missing kid, unknown kid after retry, jku/x5u SSRF suppression, fixture-header suppression in strict mode, RS256+kid structure accepted. All 140 tests pass.

T14 COMPLETE 2026-06-01 — Morpheus. Post-impl architecture review: ACCEPTED. AKS TF skeletons — correct structure, all-zero placeholder GUIDs, kube_config sensitive=true ✅. AKS manifest docs — ILLUSTRATIVE labels present, Agentic Layer / AKS Agent Gateway terminology correct, sidecar localhost-only and network-policy port 9090 absent from allow rules ✅. AgentSidecarClient/MockAgentSidecarClient — ABC design fits ADR-M5-02, localhost enforcement strict (lookalike bypass closed), blueprint audience validated before OBO, zero shared state with MCP OBO proven by T13 ✅. Tracing (T18/T19) — telemetry.py no-op-safe, PII guard correct, fixture_name suppressed in strict mode, Compose overlay pinned images/no secrets ✅. One minor non-blocking note: k8s-bootstrap namespace default ('agentic-lab') and YAML doc namespace ('agent-workloads') diverge — both illustrative placeholders; alignment deferred to M6. Spec amendment applied: tasks.md T14 Depends-on block updated to include T18 and T19. T15 now unblocked.

T13 COMPLETE 2026-05-31 — Neo. Integration tests for Agent OBO boundary: 5 test scenarios (11 parametrized cases) in tests/integration/python/test_t13_agent_obo_boundary.py. (1) test_agent_blueprint_happy_path — full pipeline validate→OBO→sanitized MCP claims; (2) test_agent_wrong_audience_rejected_before_obo — wrong-aud fixture raises HTTP 401, spy asserts downstream_api never called (FR-02); (3) test_agent_obo_does_not_share_state_with_mcp_obo — module identity assertions (agent_obo is not obo), no cross-module SidecarConfig/exchange_on_behalf_of leakage, distinct claim dict objects (NFR-06); (4) test_agent_obo_output_has_no_pii — oid/sub/email/upn/name absent from both validate and OBO output (§10/FR-05); (5) test_sidecar_non_localhost_rejected_at_construction — 7 parametrized bad URLs (external-https, private-ip, lan-ip, https-localhost, malicious-lookalike, ftp, empty) all raise ValueError (FR-06). Also fixed SidecarConfig.__post_init__ prefix check to require ':' or '/' after localhost, closing http://localhostmalicious lookalike bypass. python -m pytest -> 229 passed. T14 now unblocked (T04 ✅ T05 ✅ T12 ✅ T13 ✅ T18 ✅ T19 ✅).

T12 COMPLETE 2026-05-30 — Neo. Wired blueprint audience validation into Agentic Layer auth.py: added validate_agent_blueprint(bearer_token, sidecar_client) raises HTTP 401 before any OBO when aud != blueprint_audience; added exchange_agent_obo(bearer_token, sidecar_client, ...) returns OboExchange via sidecar. Added blueprint_audience field to Settings/config.py (env BLUEPRINT_AUDIENCE, default BLUEPRINT_AUDIENCE_PLACEHOLDER). New test file tests/security/test_t12_blueprint_audience_validation.py: 18 tests — happy-path validate, 4 rejection cases (wrong-aud/stale/untrusted-tenant/app-only) all HTTP 401, spy assertion confirming downstream_api not called on validation failure, exchange_agent_obo happy + rejection, MCP path non-regression x2, path-separation, module structure. python -m pytest -> 218 passed. T13 now ready (T08 was already done).

T15 COMPLETE 2026-06-01 — Trinity. Post-implementation security sign-off ACCEPTED: safe-claims/PII suppression verified; JWKS alg/kid/jku/x5u/timeout/cache behavior matches ADR-M5-03; Agent OBO validates blueprint audience before exchange and remains separate from MCP user OBO; bad sidecar URLs including localhost lookalikes rejected; tracing attributes remain identity_lab.* safe values with strict fixture_name blanking and local collector internal-only; Kubernetes docs are illustrative, localhost-only, 9090 not exposed, all-zero placeholders. FR-12 substitution accepted: identity_lab.authorized boolean is security/observability-equivalent to auth.outcome accepted/rejected. Focused validation: 104 M5 security/integration tests passed. T16 now ready for final validation.

Final validation passed: python -m pytest -> 229 passed; terraform fmt -check -recursive -> pass; terraform init -backend=false -> pass; terraform validate -> pass; docker compose tracing overlay config --quiet -> pass; focused M5 no-secret/no-real-ID scan -> pass.
